summary: Iteration 84: Verified Google Calendar Connection Widget on Dashboard. All features working correctly - widget displays prominently after Revenue Pipeline, shows NOT CONNECTED state with Google logo, title, description, 3 benefit checkmarks, purple CTA button, and Dismiss button. Dismiss functionality works and persists via localStorage. Settings > Scheduling tab shows Google Calendar section with tip text. Backend APIs all pass (7/7 tests).
critical_code_review_comments: CalendarConnectionWidget.tsx: Well-structured component with proper loading skeleton, connected/not-connected states
Dashboard.tsx line 638-664: Widget correctly placed after RevenuePipelineWidget, dismiss logic uses localStorage key 'kolor_calendar_hint_dismissed'
SchedulingSettings.tsx line 283-286: Tip text 'You can also connect from the main Dashboard for quick access' correctly added
All required data-testid attributes present: calendar-widget-section, calendar-widget-cta, calendar-widget-connect, dismiss-calendar-widget
context_for_next_testing_agent: Calendar Connection Widget feature fully verified. Widget shows on dashboard after Revenue Pipeline section. NOT CONNECTED state shows Google logo, 'Connect Google Calendar' title, description, 3 benefit checkmarks (Real-time sync, Auto-create events, Prevent conflicts), purple 'Connect Calendar' CTA button. Dismiss button hides widget and persists via localStorage key 'kolor_calendar_hint_dismissed'. Settings > Scheduling tab shows Google Calendar section with tip text. Backend APIs /api/google-calendar/auth-url, /status, /disconnect all working correctly.

features_verified.1_widget_position: PASS - Widget shows after Revenue Pipeline section on dashboard
features_verified.2_not_connected_state: PASS - Shows Google logo, title 'Connect Google Calendar', description, 3 benefit checkmarks
features_verified.3_benefit_checkmarks: PASS - Real-time sync, Auto-create events, Prevent conflicts all visible
features_verified.4_connect_cta_button: PASS - Purple 'Connect Calendar' button visible and functional
features_verified.6_dismiss_persistence: PASS - localStorage key 'kolor_calendar_hint_dismissed' set to 'true', persists across reload
features_verified.7_connect_api_call: PASS - Button calls /api/google-calendar/auth-url endpoint, redirects to Google OAuth
features_verified.8_settings_scheduling_tab: PASS - Google Calendar section visible with Connect/Disconnect button
features_verified.9_settings_tip_text: PASS - Tip text 'You can also connect from the main Dashboard for quick access' visible
features_verified.10_data_testid_attributes: PASS - All required: calendar-widget-section, calendar-widget-cta, calendar-widget-connect, dismiss-calendar-widget
features_verified.11_loading_skeleton: PASS - Loading skeleton shows while fetching calendar status (verified in code)
